description: Loosely connected criminal organizations originating in Ukraine, involved in drug trafficking, arms smuggling, money laundering, extortion, and corruption. They operate through decentralized alliances both within Ukraine and internationally, with influence extending into legitimate businesses and politics. The Odesa mafia is a notable subset based in the port city of Odesa.

country_links.evidence_quote: Ukrainian criminal organizations were also alleged to have trafficked weapons to war-torn places such as Afghanistan.
country_links.context: The Ukrainian mafia trafficked weapons to Afghanistan.

country_links.evidence_quote: it has since established most of its headquarters in cities such as New York City, Miami, Tel Aviv, Antwerp and Budapest
country_links.context: The Odesa mafia established a headquarters in Antwerp, Belgium.

country_links.evidence_quote: The reach of the Ukrainian criminal organizations has been reported from Central European countries such as the Czech Republic and Hungary, where they're involved in prostitution
country_links.context: The Ukrainian mafia is involved in prostitution in the Czech Republic.

country_links.evidence_quote: to North American countries and Israel, where they found a significant power base following the mass immigration of Ukrainian Jews
country_links.context: The Ukrainian mafia established a significant power base in Israel following mass immigration of Ukrainian Jews.

country_links.evidence_quote: The Ukrainians would smuggle the cigarettes from Ukraine and Eastern Europe into Italy, where with the help of the Camorra it supplied the Neapolitan market.
country_links.context: The Ukrainian mafia smuggled cigarettes into Italy, cooperating with the Camorra.

country_links.evidence_quote: Polish police have dismantled a violent Ukrainian criminal group accused of kidnapping African migrants in Poland and Latvia for ransom.
country_links.context: A Ukrainian criminal group kidnapped African migrants in Latvia for ransom.

country_links.evidence_quote: Territory: Primarily in Ukraine and Europe but also active in Turkey , United States , and Israel .
country_links.context: The Ukrainian mafia is active in Turkey.

country_links.evidence_quote: The at first locally active Odesa mafia ... became well known when it first branched out to New York City ... it has since established most of its headquarters in cities such as New York City, Miami
country_links.context: The Odesa mafia branched out to New York City and established headquarters in New York City, Miami, and other US cities.
